calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-10-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Petitioners: Chun Mei Lin and Zhi Hong Lin, are present in pro per for the Minor: Bernice Ka Yuet Lau, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Vicky Sin.
Parties and Interperter were sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: An Qi Angela Lin.
Decree signed in open court.
